text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah, Spe's race should be ending just about now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you don't want to see the results?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't need to. I already know who won.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, makes sense. No one believes in Spe more than you! Or in our
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which, I heard you told Trainer not to see you off.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm. Spe's race is more important than this. She's trying to become
the best racer in Japan after all.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, that doesn't change the fact that we're excited to see where
you go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We'll all be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I know. I'll be sure to tell you all about the scenery I see when I get
back.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week wins! She's triumphed in her clash with Mejiro Bright,
the top stayer in her class!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This is the true might of the Derby Umamusume! A fantastic prelude
to her run at the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's run was amazing and all, but there's just no competing
with the Derby Umamusume from the Golden Generation!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Now I can't wait to see how Special Week does in the spring Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
By pumping the legs higher while running, we can better work the
quadriceps... Yeah, this should be helpful for Bright's training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: If it isn't Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Bright? Our individual training schedules don't usually overlap
like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I saw you heading out here, so I decided to follow you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Would you... watch me while I train?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright... Sure, let's get running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right... Let's do one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright! You can't stop here! If you let a little run stop you, then—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Hngh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah... S-sorry... I didn't mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Caught your breath?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes... I'm so... very sorry...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Y-you have nothing to apologize for! I'm the one who pushed you too
hard...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...I can't tell you how sorry I am. I was just so... frustrated seeing you
lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching over you since we were little, so obviously you're
special to me, but that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I think I was... seeing too much of myself in you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You and I are really similar, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The final stretch is where I shine, just like you. But even though
everyone expected great things from me, I never really entered the
spotlight...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I see you, I remember how it felt to watch Ines, Oguri, and
McQueen cross the finish line ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So seeing you go through the same thing hurts even more. I don't
want you to feel the way I did!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A-ahaha... What am I even saying? You and I are different people.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: If this keeps up, I'll just be pushing my own dreams onto you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Even if you did, I would be more than happy to accept those
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The fact that you see yourself in my running tells me that you truly
care for me—that you truly wish for my success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It would be my greatest honor to return such affection with an
indisputable victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, as a Mejiro, I want to win the spring Tenno Sho again, but
more than that, I wish to win this race for you, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If that means carrying the weight of your dreams with me, I will gladly
accept such a burden.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I think I can get back to running. Don't hold back, Ryan. I
want the toughest training regimen possible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Only then will we grasp a second spring Tenno Sho victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. You got it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll throw everything I've got at you and more! We're gonna win this
race!
